channel.title: Samsung on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Samsung on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked July 22nd
item.description: Samsung announces Galaxy Unpacked for July 22nd with new foldables

item.title: Samsung Displays iPhone Fold
item.description: Samsung wins Apple's approval for foldable displays, moving iPhone Fold closer to launch

item.title: Apple Approves OLED Panels
item.description: Apple approves Samsung Display's OLED panels for foldable iPhone, with a yield rate of over 80% and a 3-year exclusive agreement
